_publications._publicationTitle: Image segmentation of plexiform neurofibromas from a deep neural network using multiple b-value diffusion data.

_contextSnippet: However, PNs in anatomy typically affected by susceptibility artifact within the head, neck and chest limit greater concordance and further work is needed to develop this technology into a routine clinical tool.
details: Performance limited by susceptibility artifacts in head, neck and chest anatomy, requiring further development for routine clinical use
